Headline: #119 Michigan/119th Temporary Reroute at 119th/Loomis
ShortDescription: 119 Michigan/119th buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions, due to street blockage near 119th/Loomis.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#119 Michigan/119th buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via 119th, Vincennes, Monterey, Western, and over normal route, due to street blockage near 119th/Loomis.

Allow extra travel time.
